branch.name: main
branch.latest_commit: af83e6ce BIG-GO-221: record mainline push blocker

commands: for path in src/bigclaw/__init__.py src/bigclaw/__main__.py src/bigclaw/audit_events.py src/bigclaw/collaboration.py src/bigclaw/console_ia.py src/bigclaw/design_system.py src/bigclaw/evaluation.py src/bigclaw/run_detail.py src/bigclaw/runtime.py; do test ! -e "$path" && printf 'absent %s\n' "$path"; done

results.assigned_path_inventory:
absent src/bigclaw/__init__.py
absent src/bigclaw/__main__.py
absent src/bigclaw/audit_events.py
absent src/bigclaw/collaboration.py
absent src/bigclaw/console_ia.py
absent src/bigclaw/design_system.py
absent src/bigclaw/evaluation.py
absent src/bigclaw/run_detail.py
absent src/bigclaw/runtime.py

notes: This lane documents the tranche-17 retired src/bigclaw module surface and hardens its Go-only state.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before the 2026-04-12 landing refresh was `6acdc7c9`.
The lane ultimately landed on `origin/main` at `af83e6cebcdcc5c8064b960632e557a57d5a69eb`.
